basic_details.job_title: NIT Andhra Pradesh Ad-hoc Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Andhra Pradesh
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Andhra Pradesh (NIT Andhra Pradesh) has published the Ad-hoc Faculty Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 6 Ad-hoc Faculty positions. Candidates holding B.Tech/B.E in CSE, ECE, EE, EEE or relevant branches along with M.Tech/M.E or equivalent qualification in CSE or relevant branch of Engineering/allied branches. Ph.D. in the relevant discipline is desirable are eligible to apply through the Walk-in process. The walk-in interview will be conducted on 26 July 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply details below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E in CSE, ECE, EE, EEE or relevant branches and M.Tech./M.E. or equivalent in CSE or relevant branch of Engineering or allied branches. Ph.D. in the relevant or equivalent discipline is desirable.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for NIT Andhra Pradesh Ad-hoc Faculty Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: NIT Andhra Pradesh Ad-hoc Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIT Andhra Pradesh Ad-hoc Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Ad-hoc Faculty positions at NIT Andhra Pradesh is scheduled for 26th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Ad-hoc Faculty post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Tech/B.E in CSE, ECE, EE, EEE or relevant branches and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent in CSE or relevant branch of Engineering or allied branches. A Ph.D. is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Ad-hoc Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs.70,000/- per month for candidates with Ph.D. qualification and Rs.55,000/- per month for those with M.Tech or equivalent qualification.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Ad-hoc Faculty post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Ad-hoc Faculty positions at NIT Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the NIT Andhra Pradesh located?
faq.answer: NIT Andhra Pradesh is located in Tadepalligudem, Andhra Pradesh, with the pincode 534101.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant documents as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Ad-hoc Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selection process includes application submission, an offline lecture demonstration, and an offline interview.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITANP/ODFA/2026-27/435.
